name: Joseph P. Arackalan
bio: 20 years of experience in the IT/ITES industry spanning software programming to heading business units. Manages day-to-day operations at IC IITP, directs marketing activities, and mentors incubated startups. Previously part of SunTec Business Solutions, an Indian startup that reached international markets.

name: Dr. Kumar Siddharth Singh
bio: An accomplished biotechnology professional with over 12 years of research experience in protein sciences and molecular biology. Leads innovation in life sciences and biotechnology at IC IITP's BioNEST facility.

name: Dr. Pradhan
bio: Facilitates infrastructural and administrative support to incubated companies, invited guests and IC IITP staff. Handles all logistics, scheduling, co-ordination of meetings and maintenance of the facility.

name: Munna Pathak
bio: The go-to person when something needs to be procured or maintained. Manages the whole procurement process including vendor management, inventory and maintenance of lab equipment and facility assets.

name: Vikash Kumar
bio: Experienced IT professional managing day-to-day IT operations since January 2017. Focuses on network, hardware, PC management and maintenance. Did his B.Tech in IT.

name: Priyesh Kumar
bio: Did his M.Tech from GGSIP University, Delhi in 2011 with 7 years of research & teaching experience. Proficient in PCB Designing & Prototyping, Embedded Firmware & Hardware Design, RFDC Sputtering, and Testing & Calibration of ESDM products. Oversees technical operations of IC Labs and co-ordinates incubatees in product prototyping.

name: Yogesh Yadav
bio: Did his B.Tech (IT) from UPTU Lucknow. Has 5 years of experience in IT and Operations Management across technical and non-technical industries, handling a variety of responsibilities in incubation support.

name: Nitesh
bio: Did his B.Com (Hons.) from BRABU University, Muzaffarpur in 2015. Has over 4 years of experience in accountancy and is a dedicated professional handling all accounting responsibilities efficiently.

name: Ansadh Kumar
bio: B.Tech in Electronics & Communication Engineering from Punjab Technical University. Prior to joining IC, worked as a design and prototyping engineer in PCB designing, assembly, testing, and UI design.

name: Deepti Anand
bio: 8 years of experience working with startups. Currently manages Zero Lab Bihar, a pre-incubation centre, overseeing day-to-day activities and supporting early-stage innovators across Bihar.

name: Amar Kumar
bio: Graduated from Ranchi St. Xavier's College and holds an MBA from Visva Bharati University. Six years of retail industry experience and seven years in administration covering purchase, event management and operations.

name: Shikha Sinha
bio: Graduated in Economics (Hons.) from Magadh Mahila College, Patna University in 2019, followed by a PG Diploma in Financial Management from Nalanda Open University.

name: Gopi Krishna Sakhinala
bio: Completed B.Tech at P.B.R.VITS in 2022. Dedicated to DST NIDHI EIR, NIDHI Prayas, and other incubation programs, supporting entrepreneurs in their early-stage journey at IC IITP.

name: Abhishek Kumar Jha
bio: Did M.Com from L.N.M.U Darbhanga in 2022. Has over 9 years of cumulative experience in accounting and auditing, with strengths in financial reporting, compliance and procurement processes.

name: Deepak Kumar
bio: Dedicated biotechnology professional with over 3 years of experience. Manages BioNEST lab operations, ensuring smooth functioning of biomedical machinery, handling procurement, and supporting resident biotech startups.
